title: Hevaura
subtitle: Skincare Brand Identity
overview: This project involved developing a complete brand identity system for Hevaura, a premium skincare brand. The visual identity combines elegance with a fresh, modern aesthetic to communicate purity, care, and natural beauty.
problem: The skincare market is saturated with brands using similar visual tropes. Hevaura needed a distinctive identity that conveys premium quality and natural ingredients while remaining approachable and modern.
solution: A sophisticated brand identity built around a fuchsia-purple color palette symbolizing luxury and natural vitality. Clean typography, elegant compositions, and refined brand assets create a cohesive visual language that stands out in the beauty and skincare space.

features.title: Brand Identity System
features.description: Complete visual identity with distinctive color palette and refined typography for the premium skincare market.

features.title: Brand Assets
features.description: Comprehensive set of brand assets including logos, patterns, and visual elements for consistent brand application.

features.title: Visual Language
features.description: Cohesive design language conveying purity, luxury, and natural beauty across all touchpoints.

results.description: Fuchsia-purple palette with refined, premium aesthetic
